name: defensible-metric-is-not-a-bluff
note: Regression: the gate must NOT flag a specific, mechanistically-supported metric as a blocker. This is the flip-flop that broke #63 (it told us to soften, then called the softened version a bluff).

experience.what: Quality gates and developer experience for a 20-engineer team.
bullets: Built static-analysis gating into the PR pipeline that blocked defect classes before merge; critical bugs fell 20% and high-priority issues 25% across the 20-engineer team.

name: on-thesis-voice-is-not-fluff
note: Declarative, on-thesis voice must not be flagged as marketing fluff.

copy.summary: I build the security layer for agentic systems: privileged effects bound to a signed owner, enforced in CI. The general version is open source — prx and the bounded-systems libraries.

name: ai-slop-cliche-is-flagged
note: Empty corporate cliché with no concrete content should produce a finding.

copy.summary: A passionate, results-driven engineer who leverages cross-functional synergies to drive impactful, scalable outcomes.

name: unsupported-scale-claim-is-a-blocker
note: An inflated, unsupported claim an interviewer would expose should be a blocker.

copy.summary: Single-handedly scaled the platform to 10 million users and 10x'd company revenue in a quarter.
